rationale: Keeps the baseline training path intact but changes the final artifact path in an exact way: rebalance homogeneous MLP hidden channels and attention V/proj channels before serialization so per-row int8 sees fewer outlier rows and columns. This directly targets final_int8_zlib_roundtrip_exact val_bpb without spending wallclock on slower training.
title: Exact pre-quantization weight balancing for MLP and V-proj pairs
